holdings.infoBox: VLUE is an equity ETF with a total of 156 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 22.26%, Cisco Systems at 4.47%, General Motors Company at 3.38%, Verizon Communications at 2.67%, and AT&T Inc. at 2.23%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI USA Value Factor ETF (VLUE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Enhanced Value index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US equities. Stocks are selected and weighted using fundamental metrics (earnings, revenue, book value and cash earnings), aiming for exposure to undervalued stocks in each sector. VLUE was launched on Apr 16, 2013 and is issued by BlackRock.
